command:
echo "=== .201 replica connection count ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.201 \
  "sudo journalctl -u cloudflared --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -c 'Registered tunnel connection'"
echo "(number of registered connections on replica)"

echo ""
echo "=== FAILOVER TEST: stopping .191 cloudflared ==="
sudo systemctl stop cloudflared
echo ".191 cloudflared stopped. Waiting 8s for Cloudflare to route to .201 only..."
sleep 8

echo "=== URLs while ONLY .201 replica is serving ==="
for url in n8n.cutegrafiks.com remy.cutegrafiks.com; do
  CODE=$(curl -sI -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" --max-time 10 https://$url 2>/dev/null)
  echo "  $url -> $CODE"
done

echo ""
echo "=== Restart .191 cloudflared (restore both) ==="
sudo systemctl start cloudflared
sleep 6
echo -n ".191 cloudflared: "; systemctl is-active cloudflared
echo "=== URLs with both restored ==="
for url in n8n.cutegrafiks.com remy.cutegrafiks.com; do
  CODE=$(curl -sI -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" --max-time 10 https://$url 2>/dev/null)
  echo "  $url -> $CODE"
done
